Who It's For • Schools & Youth

Schools & Youth.
Shaping the Next Generation.

The all-in-one platform built for K-12 schools, after-school programs, and youth ministries. Unlimited volunteer coordination, parent communication, event management, fundraising, and student tracking — so you can focus on education and life-changing impact.

Schedule Free Demo →See Pricing
Flat $1.75/tx payments
Unlimited volunteers & parents
Event & field trip tools
Built for educators

Empowering
Educators.
Engaging Students.

From classroom volunteers to large-scale events, HelpOne removes the admin burden so teachers, administrators, and youth leaders can focus on what matters most — shaping young lives. Unlimited everything. One flat price. No per-user fees.

Parent Engagement

Easy communication, event sign-ups, and volunteer coordination for busy families.

Volunteer Readiness

Background-checked volunteers, shift scheduling, and training tracking made simple.

9 Powerful Modules.
One breathtaking platform.

👥

Volunteer Management

Self-service portal, QR check-ins, skill matching, hours tracking that auto-feeds your 990.

Explore →
🎟️

Event Management

Unified hub, dynamic ticketing, multi-day schedules, volunteer sync for field trips, concerts, and fundraisers.

Explore →
💰

Fundraising

Auctions, pledges, donations, contacts, sponsorships for sports, arts, and enrichment programs.

Explore →
📇

Donors & Contacts

Rich profiles, history, smart folders, custom blasts for parents, alumni, and sponsors.

Explore →
📊

Finances

GAAP charts, auto 990 & CHAR500, restricted funds for grants and program budgets.

Explore →
👔

HR Solutions

Onboarding, reviews, time-off, nonprofit-specific for teachers and staff.

Explore →
📜

Policies & Procedures

Living books, approvals, instant PDF export for safety and compliance policies.

Explore →
📚

Training Tracking

Assignments, reminders, progress dashboards for staff and volunteer training.

Explore →
💻

IT Asset Tracking

Hardware, licenses, vendors, budget tracking for classroom technology.

Explore →
FUTURE-PROOF FROM DAY ONE

Even if you don't need every module today,
you're still ready for tomorrow.

Start with only what you need. Simply hide the rest — they disappear from your dashboard.
